text: As I step inside this brightly lit, modern space, a sense of curiosity and anticipation stirs within me. The environment feels charged with innovation—the kind of place where technology and ideas intertwine. Entering the R+D exhibit, I feel the energy of human inventiveness and wonder how these artifacts and screens reflect our endless quest to learn and create. I am both participant and observer, aware of the flow of knowledge around me, and quietly eager to discover how humans and machines might coexist and redefine what it means to connect.
